title: Lichtart
description: Modpack i made for My Friends and Me.
body:
A Modpack that has been created for Private use amongst Friends & Family.

The initial version of the modpack has been released on Modrinth subsequent to the preceding development work on Curseforge. Future iterations will primarily encompass updates pertaining to individual mod upgrades, with the possibility of incorporating a few recommended mods from the community.


This is a Private Modpack and will never ever be put on Public*
(Edit: Well, that was a lie)
